entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop grown in semi-arid regions.

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A limiting nutrient essential for plant growth and development.

entities.name: LOW P ALFISOL
entities.description: A soil type characterized by low phosphorus availability.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Geographical areas where pearl millet is typically cultivated.

entities.name: SEEDLING ESTABLISHMENT
entities.description: The ability of a seed to germinate and establish a healthy plant.

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural output of the crop.

entities.name: SEED PRIMING
entities.description: A pre-sowing treatment of seeds to improve germination and growth.

entities.name: SEED COATING
entities.description: The application of a phosphorus-containing layer to the seed surface.

entities.name: SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the plant's shoot system at specific growth stages.

entities.name: PANICLE YIELD
entities.description: The yield of the grain-bearing panicle of the plant.

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The yield of the vegetative parts of the plant excluding the panicle.

entities.name: TIME TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days from sowing until the plant begins to flower.
